name: 金句型（價值觀宣言）
description: 女主用簡短有力的句子宣告自己的立場和新生活態度，具有slogan般的記憶點和傳播力。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: I used to wish so much that you would give me warmth and love. But you didn't. I don't need it now. A love that comes too late is worthless.
